info.title: ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.Tool
info.description: Global dotnet tool for command-line QR code generation in console, SVG, PNG, JPEG, ASCII, or PDF formats.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: QR code generator tool — encode text as console, SVG, PNG, JPEG, ASCII, or PDF

arguments.name: text
arguments.description: The text to encode in the QR code
